task_objective: Industrial Product Pattern Generation & Relief Art Processing

material.finish: Matte with polished relief details, precision engraving
material.frame_description: Clean industrial brass frame structure, raw material preserved

step_1_line_extraction.detail: Identify the outer frame boundary and the central rectangular area. The outer frame defines the raw material structure; the central rectangular area defines the relief pattern canvas.

step_2_aesthetic_extraction.detail: Extract style, chromatic narrative, patterns, and textures from the inspiration image to be applied within the central rectangular area only.

step_3_prompt_generation.action: Design prompts for the central rectangular area of Figure 1 combined with aesthetic elements from Figure 2

constraints.prefix: No text, Straight-on front view, macro product photography, strictly preserving the original structural lines. The central rectangular area serves as the canvas for relief pattern, matte with polished relief details, precision engraving.The peripheral frame keep Clean structure, raw material preserved. 4k, hyper-realistic.soft grey background.

final_execution: Generate 4 high-fidelity images based on the 4 prompts and present them in a 2x2 Four-panel Grid.
